PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerard Delonzor (via court call) in Propria Persona.

The Court asked Mr. Delonzor if he lived in the Bay Area. Mr. Delonzor reported that he lives in Sacramento. The Court stated that there are a couple of reasons that it strongly encourages petitioners to have counsel, that the administration of the estate is highly technical and that problems can arise. Mr. Delonzor stated that this estate is small and that he needs hospital records for his deceased sister. The Court stated that he may find himself litigating with the hospital. Mr. Delonzor stated that the hospital said he needed Letters of Administration. The Court asked if he knew what the next steps were. Mr. Delonzor stated that he is following the Nolo Press book, that he could not say what the next steps were at this moment and that he is trying to go step by step. The Court stated that it is really important to have an idea of the whole process or you may have a problem with the flow, that once you are appointed as administrator you take on legal responsibilities, that for example if there is a claim for a lot of money and you mess it up it could lead to liability and that having legal advice is really important. The Court stated that it is prepared to grant the petition if Mr. Delonzor wants or will continue the hearing to give time to obtain counsel. Mr. Delonzor stated that he need to obtain the hospital records before May 2, 2016. The Court granted the petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order), encouraged Mr. Delonzor to get legal advice and stated that he will need to fully understand the duties and obligations as he will be held to those. A status on filing an Inventory & Appraisal and associated documents is set for July 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A status on filing a Petition for Final Distribution is set for September 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Continued To Mar-30-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
